'''ngangasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabbatizer|sabbatizer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-ng-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabbatizer|sabbatizer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngangasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngængæshæth|ngængæshæth]] || [[word:ngængæshæj|ngængæshæj]] || [[word:ngængæshæsh|ngængæshæsh]] || [[word:ngængæshæ|ngængæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngangangashath|ngangangashath]] || [[word:ngangangashaj|ngangangashaj]] || [[word:ngangangashash|ngangangashash]] || [[word:ngangangasha|ngangangasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngangashath|ngangashath]] || [[word:ngangashaj|ngangashaj]] || [[word:ngangashash|ngangashash]] || [[word:ngangasha|ngangasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngangafshath|ngangafshath]] || [[word:ngangafshaj|ngangafshaj]] || [[word:ngangafshash|ngangafshash]] || [[word:ngangafshaf|ngangafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngangashatha|ngangashatha]] || [[word:ngangashaja|ngangashaja]] || [[word:ngangashasha|ngangashasha]] || [[word:ngangashaka|ngangashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngangashath|ngangashath]] || [[word:ngangashaj|ngangashaj]] || [[word:ngangashash|ngangashash]] || [[word:ngangasha|ngangasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngangashathal|ngangashathal]] || [[word:ngangashajal|ngangashajal]] || [[word:ngangashashal|ngangashashal]] || [[word:ngangashakal|ngangashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngangashathatha|ngangashathatha]] || [[word:ngangashajaja|ngangashajaja]] || [[word:ngangashashasha|ngangashashasha]] || [[word:ngangashaka|ngangashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngangashathan|ngangashathan]] || [[word:ngangashajan|ngangashajan]] || [[word:ngangashashan|ngangashashan]] || [[word:ngangashakan|ngangashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngangashathaoro|ngangashathaoro]] || [[word:ngangashajaoro|ngangashajaoro]] || [[word:ngangashashaoro|ngangashashaoro]] || [[word:ngangashakaoro|ngangashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
